name: Gun Chain
short_description: Run, Gun and Match! Gun Chain is an action puzzle shooter. VR is not required.
detailed_description:
Gun Chain the trigger happy puzzle shooter!

Utilize your Orb Pistol to launch different colored orbs. Destroy chains to complete levels. Defeat all enemies in your path and fight bosses in a unique puzzle style.

A call back to classic games like Puzz loop and Zuma but thrown into a first person world. Target recognition, movement and speed are the key to becoming a excellent Gun Chainer.

Full Virtual Reality support. Including oculusrift, Vive and others. Virtual Reality provides an engaging new way to play. Virtual Reality fully supported but not required.

Features

  • 5 Unique themed worlds each with several levels
  • 5 Unlockable weapons
  • Multiphase boss battles
  • VR Support (but not required)
  • Twitch streaming features (Play with chat!)
